subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-07-19
subcodes.first_line: I was acquainted with a Sufi who wrote a letter with his own hand to Fath-'Ali-Shah [3.5s]... ...Fath-'Ali Shah had jailed some 200 Turkomans he intended to kill. Mirza Abu'l-Qasim
subcodes.first_line_orig: صوفى بود من مکتوب خط خود او را بفتح عليشاه ديدهام وقتى شاه دويست ترکمان را گرفت بکشد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @petitions to authorities, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness
